settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.subtitle: Same-day delivery in Doha and fast shipping across Qatar, the GCC and the UK.

settings.heading: Delivery options & times
settings.subtitle: Choose the option that suits you — real rates only, no surprises at checkout.

settings.title: Same-day in Doha
settings.text: Order before 4 PM and get it the same day inside Doha. Free on orders over QAR 150.

settings.title: Across Qatar
settings.text: 1–2 working days to all other areas in Qatar with full tracking.

settings.title: GCC & UK
settings.text: We ship across the GCC and to the UK. Timelines and rates are shown at checkout.

settings.heading: Regions & tracking
settings.content:
We deliver across Qatar, the wider GCC and the UK. Once your order ships you will receive a tracking link by email and SMS.

You can also check your delivery status any time from our Track Order page. For anything urgent, message our Doha team and we will help.
